evals.prompt:
Orient me in this project. Here's the structure:
```
TaskManager/
  TaskManager.sln
  src/
    TaskManager.Domain/
      TaskManager.Domain.csproj  (net8.0, no dependencies)
      Entities/
        TaskItem.cs
        Project.cs
      Interfaces/
        ITaskRepository.cs
        IProjectRepository.cs
      ValueObjects/
        Priority.cs
        TaskStatus.cs
    TaskManager.Application/
      TaskManager.Application.csproj  (net8.0, refs: Domain)
      Commands/
        CreateTaskCommand.cs
        UpdateTaskCommand.cs
      Queries/
        GetTasksQuery.cs
      Interfaces/
        IEmailService.cs
    TaskManager.Infrastructure/
      TaskManager.Infrastructure.csproj  (net8.0, refs: Domain, Application)
      Persistence/
        AppDbContext.cs
        TaskRepository.cs
      Services/
        EmailService.cs
    TaskManager.API/
      TaskManager.API.csproj  (net8.0, refs: Application, Infrastructure)
      Program.cs
      Controllers/
        TasksController.cs
        ProjectsController.cs
      appsettings.json
  tests/
    TaskManager.UnitTests/
      TaskManager.UnitTests.csproj  (refs: Domain, Application)
    TaskManager.IntegrationTests/
      TaskManager.IntegrationTests.csproj  (refs: Infrastructure, API)
```
evals.expected_output: Structured project orientation identifying Clean Architecture pattern
expectations: Identifies the project as a .NET 8 Web API application
Identifies the architectural pattern as Clean Architecture (or Onion/Hexagonal)
Lists the key entry point (Program.cs in the API project)
Maps the layer dependencies correctly (API → Application/Infrastructure → Domain)
Identifies both test projects and their scope (unit vs integration)

evals.prompt:
What does this project do? Here's what I see:
```
weather-dashboard/
  package.json          (name: weather-dashboard, dependencies: react, axios, recharts, tailwindcss)
  src/
    index.tsx
    App.tsx
    api/
      weatherApi.ts     (exports: fetchForecast, fetchCurrentWeather, fetchAlerts)
    components/
      Dashboard.tsx
      ForecastChart.tsx
      AlertBanner.tsx
      LocationSearch.tsx
    hooks/
      useWeather.ts
      useGeolocation.ts
    types/
      weather.ts
    utils/
      formatTemperature.ts
      dateUtils.ts
  public/
    index.html
  tailwind.config.js
  tsconfig.json
  vite.config.ts
```
evals.expected_output: Project orientation identifying a React weather dashboard with key features
expectations: Identifies this as a React/TypeScript frontend application
Identifies the build tool as Vite
Identifies the main purpose (weather dashboard with forecasts, alerts, and location search)
Mentions the charting library (Recharts) and styling approach (Tailwind CSS)
